content: whisper.cpp v1.9.1 (2026, ggml-org). Model RAM: tiny.en ~273MB, base.en ~388MB, small.en ~852MB. Disk: base.en 142MB, small.en 466MB. Metal gives 4.4x speedup on Apple Silicon. CoreML encoder path adds ~3x over CPU. Swift bindings: SwiftWhisper (exPHAT) SPM wrapper, zero deps. whisper.cpp repo has native iOS support.
